entities.schema_notes: XML structure with <evaluation> root element containing multiple <qa_pair> elements; each <qa_pair> has <question> and <answer> fields
entities.source_text:
Create an XML file with this structure:

```xml
<evaluation>
  <qa_pair>
    <question>Find discussions about AI model launches with animal codenames. One model needed a specific safety designation that uses the format ASL-X. What number X was being determined for the model named after a spotted wild cat?</question>
    <answer>3</answer>
  </qa_pair>
<!-- More qa_pairs... -->
</evaluation>
```

entities.schema_notes: XML structure with <evaluation> root element containing multiple <qa_pair> elements; each <qa_pair> has <question> and <answer> fields
entities.source_text:
Create your evaluation file (`my_evaluation.xml`):

```xml
<evaluation>
   <qa_pair>
      <question>Find the user who created the most issues in January 2024. What is their username?</question>
      <answer>alice_developer</answer>
   </qa_pair>
   <qa_pair>
      <question>Among all pull requests merged in Q1 2024, which repository had the highest number? Provide the repository name.</question>
      <answer>backend-api</answer>
   </qa_pair>
   <qa_pair>
      <question>Find the project that was completed in December 2023 and had the longest duration from start to finish. How many days did it take?</question>
      <answer>127</answer>
   </qa_pair>
</evaluation>
```

workflow_steps.source_text: Balance comprehensive API endpoint coverage with specialized workflow tools.
Navigate the MCP specification: Start with the sitemap to find relevant pages.

workflow_steps.description: Study framework documentation for TypeScript and Python
workflow_steps.source_text: Load framework documentation: For TypeScript (recommended): Use WebFetch to load TypeScript SDK.

workflow_steps.description: Plan the implementation of the MCP server
workflow_steps.source_text: Understand the API: Review the service's API documentation to identify key endpoints.

workflow_steps.description: Set up project structure for MCP server
workflow_steps.source_text: See language-specific guides for project setup.

workflow_steps.description: Implement core infrastructure for MCP server
workflow_steps.source_text: Create shared utilities: API client with authentication, error handling helpers.
For each tool: Input Schema: Use Zod (TypeScript) or Pydantic (Python).

workflow_steps.description: Review code quality for MCP server
workflow_steps.source_text: Review for: No duplicated code (DRY principle), consistent error handling.

workflow_steps.description: Build and test the MCP server
workflow_steps.source_text: TypeScript: Run `npm run build` to verify compilation.

workflow_steps.description: Create evaluations to test MCP server effectiveness
workflow_steps.source_text: After implementing your MCP server, create comprehensive evaluations.
